title: Explore workspace tab information architecture
description: Revisit whether Groups, Settings, and Account should remain separate tabs or be consolidated/expanded now that the immediate density and action-placement issues are cleaned up. Acceptance: propose a page/tab structure with concrete content responsibilities before further UI reshuffling.

title: Fix edit account modal alignment and game select density
description: Edit account modal appears off-center. Game select option/control icon is too large and cramped; make icon sizing and padding feel balanced.
close_reason: Centered edit account modal by allowing portal rendering, compacted game select icon sizing, reserved left-section padding, and added regression tests; verified tests/typecheck/lint/build.

title: Improve accounts UX
description: Review the current accounts UX, identify a concrete improvement, implement it with tests, and ship via the project bead workflow.
close_reason: Implemented actionable empty-state UX for accounts table, fixed stale HTTPS dev-server listener conflict, and verified tests/typecheck/build/lint.

title: Refine workspace tab UX
description: Address tab-level UX issues across Accounts, Groups, Settings, and Account: cleaner account row selection/click targets, harmonized account actions, denser groups list, inline group rename affordance, sticky theme toggle, and less oversized account page layout.
close_reason: Refined Accounts row selection and actions, compacted Groups list with inline rename, moved theme toggle to workspace header, and tightened Account page layout; verified tests/typecheck/lint/build.

title: Polish dark mode theme
description: Improve ugly dark mode visual design: reduce flat gray surfaces, improve background/sidebar/table hierarchy, tune borders and input surfaces, and preserve readable contrast.
close_reason: Reworked dark mode from flat gray to layered navy/slate shell and table surfaces; tuned root dark tokens, Mantine dark palette, text-label input surfaces, and added regression tests. Verified tests/typecheck/lint/build plus browser sanity check.
